title: Beyond Gradient Descent
tagline: Newton, BFGS, natural gradient, evolutionary, gradient-free — five non-SGD ideas, live on a 2D loss
summary: SGD/Adam aren't the only choices. Race Newton's method, BFGS, natural gradient, CMA-ES (evolutionary), and a gradient-free SPSA optimiser on the same 2D non-convex loss. See where each leaps to the optimum, where each gets stuck, and which to reach for in your lab.
highlights: Five optimisers run live on the same 2D non-convex landscape; their trajectories overlay.
Step counter + final loss for each so you can compare convergence cost.
Loss surface selector (quadratic / Rosenbrock / two-bowls) toggles which optimiser shines.
When to pick what — the lab decision matrix.
